paths.model_dir: Directory containing ML model files (relative to project or absolute path). Default: 'models' - can be external path like 'C:\Users\...\models'
paths.log_file: Path to threat detection log file (relative to project dir)
paths.baseline_file: Path to user baseline statistics file (relative to project dir)
paths.threshold_config: Path to threshold configuration file (relative to project dir)

notes: All paths are relative to the project directory unless specified as absolute paths.
To use absolute paths, provide the full path (e.g., 'C:\\Users\\...\\models').
The model_dir can be external to the project if needed.
